Credit Risk.description: Risk of loss arising from a borrower or counterparty failing to meet its obligations.

Operational Risk.description: Risk of loss from inadequate or failed internal processes, people, systems, or external events.

Market Risk.description: Risk of loss from adverse movements in market prices or rates.

Compliance Risk.description: Risk from failure to comply with laws and regulations.

Strategic Risk.description: Risk to earnings from adverse business decisions or improper strategy implementation.

Interest Rate Risk.description: Risk from interest rate changes affecting assets and liabilities.

Liquidity Risk.description: Risk of inability to meet obligations as they become due.
